category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a language server for Dockerfiles powered by Node, TypeScript, and VSCode.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dockerfile-language-server; official GitHub repository title describes a Dockerfile language server.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes development, installation, and language server settings documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify Dockerfile language server functionality and installation as docker-langserver.
